title: Fluffy Syrian Stilton Flatbread
description: A tangy and pillowy Syrian dish featuring Stilton cheese, this flatbread is perfect for a romantic dinner, and can be made paleo-friendly by using paleo-friendly alternatives to traditional ingredients. The air-fry method used in this recipe helps to achieve a crispy crust while keeping the inside fluffy and soft.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the Stilton cheese to the bowl and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and olive oil.
Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place in the air fryer basket.
Cook the flatbreads for 5 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Garnish with sesame seeds and serve immediately.
